Tokenomics
Active Rewards
$PAI holders earn $ETH as gamified airdrop rewards for every project we assist. Revenue sources include custom AI solutions, betting platform, licensing, and premium subscriptions.
Smart Tax System
A 4% tax on transactions fuels growth and stability (1% for weekly buyback fund for gamified airdrop rewards, 1% for auto-liquidity, 2% for development and scaling).
PAI operates with a unique token system on the blockchain for transactions and rewards.
Holders benefit from an innovative revenue-sharing model and exclusive access to new AI features. Ensuring fairness to all through no centralized group control by specific holders.
Revenue sources include custom AI solutions, betting platform, licensing, and premium subscriptions.
Slide
Airdrops
Active Rewards
Secure your PAI tokens and reap ongoing rewards. 1% of the tax and 100% of revenue generated from our ecosystem are allocated to a weekly buyback fund, which powers our gamified airdrop rewards, maximizing reward value for a maximum number of holders at random.
1% of the tax volume dedicated to a weekly buyback fund.
Revenue share from image generation services.
Revenue share from betting platform.
Community-driven project airdrops.
Active Airdrop (Reward Distribution) Model:
This is our PAIoneering reward distribution (experimental revenue sharing) model. The conventional method of staking tokens for extended periods with limited autonomy to receive minimal rewards (often one dimensional distribution based on amount of tokens held alone) is less than optimal. At Purple AI, we are bringing you a unique, fresh approach, one that resonates with the engaging ethos of our $PAI ecosystem.
Expand Full Active Airdrop Details
We integrate a weighted probability distribution to allocate rewards based on multipliers, inspired by principles from the risk-neutral probability measure used in the Black-Scholes/Merton model. We incorporate insights from behavioral economics, rewarding actions that align with the long-term health of our token economy. Instead of small, stretched-out rewards, we introduce frequent, gamified airdrop rewards. This method will select random holders under specific parameters, maximizing the number of participants each time, and grant them a reward in $ETH or tokens - an amount with tangible value.

This approach is supported by allocating 1% of taxes from each $PAI transaction and all revenue generated within our ecosystem such as our custom AI bot creating services and betting platform into a weekly buyback fund specifically for these gamified active airdrop rewards. This ensures that the rewards are substantial and the events, exciting.

The distribution algorithm will factor in the duration for which tokens are held, the quantity, and multipliers that enhance the probability of receiving airdrops. These multipliers will be judiciously calculated to maintain balance and fairness.

  • This is our simplified formula for you to understand the backbone of this model:

    • R is the reward multiplier for a holder, defined as follows:

      • R = H • T • B • S • L

    • Where:

      • H represents the holding time multiplier.

      • T is the tokens held multiplier.

      • B accounts for buying behavior, rewarding large, one-time purchases.

      • S decreases the chances of swing traders receiving rewards to promote stability.

      • L increases the chances if $PAI is within the top 3 holdings in a wallet.

    • Definition of each multiplier:

      1. H = log(1 + Time held in days)

      2. T = √(Tokens held)

      3. B = (Number of buys)^(-1); (Rewarding fewer, larger buys)

      4. S = e^(−Number of sells in the last 30 days); (Disincentivizing frequent selling)

      5. L = 1.5 if $PAI is in top 3 holdings, 1 otherwise

    • This formula considers holding duration, the amount held, purchase behavior, and loyalty to $PAI. We will continuously adapt and monitor for fairness and impact. The multipliers and parameters will be continuously adjusted to ensure that no single strategy disproportionately dominates the reward system.

    • This formula considers holding duration, the amount held, purchase behavior, and loyalty to $PAI. We will continuously adapt and monitor for fairness and impact. The multipliers and parameters will be continuously adjusted to ensure that no single strategy disproportionately dominates the reward system.
Slide
Phase 1
Foundation and Growth
Establishment and Launch
Official launch of the Purple AI (PAI) platform. Deployment of the initial website and user interface. Integration with basic blockchain functionalities for token transactions and rewards system.
Development of Core AI Tools and Additional Features
Release of VisualPAI for basic image generation. Launch of DesignPAI for design elements creation. Initiate development of the AI smart contract auditing tool SecureAI.
Expansion into Web3 and Betting Platform
Development and beta testing of the web3 betting platform PAI Casino with integrated casino and games.
Community Building and Engagement
Initiate community-driven projects and collaborations. Start a forum for user feedback and suggestions. Host regular voice chats and twitter spaces and upload tutorials for users to better understand and utilize PAI tools.
Partnerships and Collaborations
Establish partnerships with blockchain/web3 projects, tech companies, graphic design studios, and educational institutions for broader reach and enhanced tool capabilities.
Video Generation AI Model Introduction
Learn from companies at the forefront of text/image-to-video generation and develop our own AI models while innovating further upon existing technologies to integrate them into the PAI ecosystem.
Phase 2
Expansion and Diversification
Advanced Tool Development and Metaverse Introduction
Release of ArtPAI X for digital art creation. Start development of the NFT-based metaverse for community interaction. Introduce AI tools for animation and 3D modeling. Beta launch of the NFT metaverse.
Mobile Application Launch and Betting Platform Expansion
Launch of PAI mobile app for easier accessibility and on-the-go image creation. Beta launch of the web3 betting platform PAI Casino with expanded game offerings.
Global Market Penetration and Metaverse Engagement
Expand the platform's reach to international markets. Localize the platform for different languages and regions. Beta testing operations of NFT-based metaverse.
Innovative Feature Introduction and Sustainability
Incorporate virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) capabilities into PAI tools. Assess and implement sustainable practices in operations. Introduce AI-driven market analysis tools for trend prediction in visual design and gaming.
Community-Driven Development
Focus on community-driven tool enhancements, feature requests, and metaverse development. Organize a global online summit for PAI users, developers, and enthusiasts to share insights, experiences, and future roadmaps.
Long-Term Growth, Scalability, and Continuous Innovation
Plan for long-term growth, focusing on continuous innovation in AI-driven image creation, smart contract auditing, web3 gaming, and metaverse experiences. Assess the environmental impact of PAI operations and implement sustainable practices. Plan for long-term growth and continuous innovation in the field of AI-driven image creation.
Slide
PAI Ambassador Program
Introducing the PAI Ambassador Program
PAI is an AI ecosystem focused on customizable, personalized image generation for large-scale, small, or individual project use; as well as other blockchain tools (details found here). Our platform allows users to develop custom AI for unique image creation, catering to diverse needs ranging from graphic design to digital art. PAI integrates state-of-the-art AI to enable stunning visual creations across various platforms.
Step 1: Engage and Introduce
Reach out to projects that could benefit from their own custom, image-generating AI bot. Demonstrate how the PAI Creator Bot can enhance their Telegram community's experience and engagement.
Step 2: Facilitate the Integration
Assist the project team in creating and integrating their unique AI bot through our PAI Creator Bot platform, ensuring a smooth and successful launch within their community.
Step 3: Verify Your Success
Once the AI bot is up and running, head over to purplesquare.ai/contact to verify the integration. Please provide us with:

- A link to the Telegram group featuring the newly integrated AI bot.
- Your ERC-20 wallet address where we'll send your reward.
-The Telegram or Twitter contact information of the project and the representative you worked with.
Vetting
Our team will thoroughly review each submission to confirm the AI bot's successful integration. Following verification, you'll be rewarded for your instrumental role in promoting AI innovation and contributing to the growth of the PAI ecosystem.
Rewards & Recognition
Your efforts as a PAI Ambassador will not go unnoticed. Successful ambassadors will receive rewards as a token of our appreciation for their dedication to spreading the word about PAI's AI capabilities and for playing a critical role in our ecosystem's expansion.
Why Join the PAI Ambassador Program?
Empower Communities
Help projects revolutionize their Telegram chats with bespoke AI functionalities.
Earn Rewards
Receive $PAI tokens as gratitude for each successful integration.
Be a Pioneer
Stand at the forefront of AI technology, fostering innovation across the digital sphere.
Get Started Today
Are you ready to drive the future of AI in community engagement? Visit our contact page to begin your journey as a PAI Ambassador and make a lasting impact in the PAI ecosystem and beyond.
Join us—shape the future, one AI integration at a time.
Slide
CONNECT WITH US
Reach out for queries, collaborations, or to kickstart your PAI journey. Join our platform today and redefine your visual content with cutting-edge AI technology.
Partners and Collaborators. Be the first to experience the mobile revolution of customizable and personalized AI-driven image creation.
